name: Mistral AI
description: Mistral AI provides high-performance language models for chat completion, code generation, embeddings, content moderation, classification, OCR, and audio transcription. It offers both open-weight and commercial models with tool calling, JSON output, vision capabilities, fill-in-the-middle code completion, fine-tuning, batch processing, and file management.

capabilities.name: chat_completion_create
capabilities.description: Generate conversational responses using Mistral's language models. Supports tool calling, JSON output, vision, streaming, and extended thinking.

capabilities.name: fim_completion_create
capabilities.description: Generate code completions using fill-in-the-middle (FIM) for code editors and IDE integrations.

capabilities.name: agents_completion_create
capabilities.description: Generate responses for agentic workflows using Mistral's agent models.

capabilities.name: embedding_create
capabilities.description: Generate vector embeddings for text inputs, useful for semantic search, clustering, and RAG pipelines.

capabilities.name: moderation_create
capabilities.description: Classify text for harmful or unsafe content categories using Mistral's moderation model.

capabilities.name: classification_create
capabilities.description: Classify text into categories using Mistral's classification models.

capabilities.name: ocr_create
capabilities.description: Extract text and structured content from images and documents using optical character recognition.

capabilities.name: audio_transcription_create
capabilities.description: Convert audio to text using Mistral's speech recognition model.

capabilities.name: models_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve the list of available Mistral models with their IDs and capabilities.

capabilities.name: model_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve information about a specific Mistral model.

capabilities.name: files_list
capabilities.description: List uploaded files.

capabilities.name: file_upload
capabilities.description: Upload a file for use with fine-tuning or batch processing.

capabilities.name: file_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve metadata about a specific uploaded file.

capabilities.name: file_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an uploaded file.

capabilities.name: fine_tuning_job_create
capabilities.description: Create a fine-tuning job to customize a Mistral model with training data.

capabilities.name: fine_tuning_jobs_list
capabilities.description: List all fine-tuning jobs.

capabilities.name: fine_tuning_job_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the status and details of a specific fine-tuning job.

capabilities.name: fine_tuning_job_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel an in-progress fine-tuning job.

capabilities.name: batch_job_create
capabilities.description: Create a batch job for asynchronous request processing.

capabilities.name: batch_jobs_list
capabilities.description: List all batch jobs.

capabilities.name: batch_job_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the status of a specific batch job.

capabilities.name: batch_job_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel an in-progress batch job.
